title: 99809A - VRC Robotics
subtitle: Completed April 2021
subheader: 99809A was the VRC robotics team that I was a part of during high school. We competed in the 2020-2021 season, and qualified for the state championship, but were unable to attend due to COVID-19.

content.value: VexDB is now deprecated, so there's very little information about our VRC robotics team online.
